title: tithymalus × budensis
intro: Tithymalus × budensis, also known as a hybrid of Euphorbia species, is a plant with milky latex sap that contains medicinally active compounds. The medicinal properties of Tithymalus × budensis include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include relief from pain and swelling, as well as protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Tithymalus × budensis can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams for local application, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential medicinal uses.
